data.title: Russia announces new oil price formula to protect budget from sanctions and market swings
data.description:
Russia is changing how it handles oil money. On Thursday, the Finance Ministry said it plans to roll out a new oil price formula next year that would lower the cut-off price for oil revenues going into the country’s fiscal reserve fund. The goal is reportedly to protect the national budget from market swings and […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russia-announces-new-oil-price-formula/

data.title: OKX plans to adjust the funding frequency for BARDUSDT perpetual contracts on September 19th.
data.description: According to the official announcement, OKX plans to adjust the funding settlement frequency of BARDUSDT perpetual contracts on September 19, 2025. Before the adjustment, the funding settlement frequency was every 4 hours, and after the adjustment, the funding settlement frequency will be every 2 hours.

data.title: Trump: The stock market will do better over time
data.description: US President Trump said the stock market has hit a new high and will perform better over time. (Jinshi)

data.title: Citigroup raises its price target on cryptocurrency exchange Bullish to $70 and reiterates its buy rating
data.description: Citigroup raised its target price for cryptocurrency exchange Bullish to $70 due to better-than-expected second-quarter results, strong IPO momentum, and accelerated SS&O growth. Citigroup said the long-awaited BitLicense approval from the New York Department of Financial Services (NYDFS) removed a key regulatory hurdle, boosting investor confidence. Citigroup also reiterated its buy rating, saying the company has attractive operating leverage. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Jia Yueting: The US SEC's simplified crypto ETF listing process opens the door to assets like Solana
data.description: Faraday Future founder Jia Yueting posted on the X platform that the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission has taken a historic step: spot cryptocurrency ETFs other than BTC/ETH now have a streamlined 75-day listing path, opening the door for assets like Solana. The regulatory framework is catching up with the strategy that forward-thinking corporate finance departments have already begun implementing: making diversified digital assets a core component of their balance sheets.

data.title: Monad launches Momentum, an incentive program, with the first round of applications set to close on September 28th
data.description: Monad announced the launch of Monad Momentum, an ecosystem incentive program, on the X platform. The first round of applications will close on September 28th. The Monad Momentum program utilizes an incentive-driven matching model, meaning project recipients participate, with teams initially investing their own resources, and Monad Momentum supplementing them.

data.description:
For the first time in the U. S. , an exchange-traded fund tracking the price of the third-largest cryptocurrency, XRP, has begun trading.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/370941/rex-osprey-launches-first-of-its-kind-xrp-etf-under-unique-legal-structure?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: SOL News Today: Price Jumps 5% as ETF Optimism, Whale Buying Fuel Rally
data.description: Key TakeawaysSolana price rises 5.39%, outperforming broader crypto market’s 2.52% gainETF optimism grows, with approval odds rising to 90% by late 2025SOL price trajectory follows BNB which just reached new ATH, says analystSolana price rose over 5% in the past 24 hours, driven by growing ETF optimism, institutional inflows, and technical strength. The rally positions SOL as one of today’s top-performing digital assets amid renewed market momentum.ETF Hype and Whale AccumulationSolana (SOL) surged 5.39% to $247.34, outpacing the broader crypto market’s 2.52% advance. The rise comes amid increasing speculation around Solana spot ETFs, strategic accumulation by institutions, and a confirmed technical breakout above key levels.Bloomberg analysts now place a 90% chance of Solana ETF approval by late 2025, following recent SEC engagement with issuers like VanEck and 21Shares. Additionally, the REX-Osprey SOL Staking ETF (SSK) launched on September 18 with $72 million in initial inflows. Institutional Treasuries Expand to $4.2 BillionForward Industries committed $1.65 billion to acquire and stake SOL, while Pantera Capital and Galaxy Digital collectively added $306 million in a single day.According to data from CoinGecko, total public treasury holdings of SOL are now close to 13.5 million tokens, valued at $3.32 billion.Technical Breakout, Key Levels to WatchSOL has broken above its 7-day simple moving average (SMA) at $238.63 and reclaimed the Fibonacci 23.6% retracement at $231.87. Indicators like the MACD histogram (+2.01) and RSI (74.7) suggest strong upward momentum, albeit approaching overbought territory.Traders are now watching for a move toward the $269.02 Fibonacci extension, while a breakout above $295 could confirm a cup-and-handle pattern, setting up a long-term technical target near $540.SOL Outlook: Can it Mirror BNB’s Path to a New ATH?According to Cointelegraph, Solana is showing a classic bullish continuation pattern known as a “cup and handle,” positioning it for a potential breakout to new highs. Analysis also compares SOL to BNB, which recently broke past the $1000 level to achieve a new all-time high. According to analysts, if the bullish pattern holds, SOL could rise another 20% in the coming weeks, breaking above its all-time high near $295.

data.title: Chicago Board Options Exchange announces the listing of Dogecoin ETF
data.description: The Chicago Board Options Exchange (CBOE) announced the listing of the Ripple (Ripple) and Dogecoin (Dogecoin) exchange-traded funds (EX-Osprey XRP ETF (XRPR)) and REX-Osprey DOGE ETF (DOJE) in a post on the X platform.

data.title: Greeks.live: Traders actively sell put options and expect price increases
data.description: Adam, a macro researcher at Greeks.live, published an English community newsletter stating: "The group showed a predominantly bullish sentiment, with traders actively selling put options and anticipating price increases. There was a consensus on the timing of a key event around 02:00, which was expected to be the "end of the world," but the outcome was lackluster. Focusing on selling ETH put options, traders described the volatility premium as "extremely attractive" and "rich."

data.title: A whale has profited nearly 9 times after holding APX for two years.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a certain diamond-handed whale spent $226,000 to purchase 3.62 million APX two years ago, which is now worth $2.03 million, a profit of nearly 9 times.

data.title: Kraken Partners with Legion to Launch Compliant Token Sale Platform
data.description: Cryptocurrency exchange Kraken announced a partnership with ICO platform Legion to conduct MiCA-compliant token sales on its newly launched Kraken Launch platform. Both parties said the first joint token sale will launch next week. (The Block)

data.title: The Fed's interest rate cut ignited Wall Street's enthusiasm, and US stocks reversed the wait-and-see sentiment
data.description: The Federal Reserve announced its first interest rate cut of 2025 and hinted at further cuts in the future, fueling a risk-on mood on Wall Street and sending US stocks sharply higher. Thursday's gains marked a reversal from traders' initial reaction to the Fed's decision the previous day, which saw profit-taking on over-performing tech stocks. Robert Schein, chief investment officer at wealth management firm Blanke Schein, said: "The Fed cutting rates at a time when the stock market is at record highs and the economy is still growing is a very unique backdrop, as Fed rate cuts are typically associated with economic issues. This dynamic is positive for the stock market." US cryptocurrency stocks rallied in early trading, with Bullish surging over 10% after its first quarterly report since going public, returning to profitability and exceeding both earnings and guidance expectations. BMNR rose over 10%, Circle rose over 5%, and Robinhood rose over 3%.

data.title: Brera Holdings changes its name to Solmate and raises $300 million to launch SOL Treasury
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Brera Holdings announced a name change to Solmate and a $300 million fundraising round to launch its Solana (SOL) treasury. Investors include Pulsar Group, a UAE-based technology and blockchain consulting firm; the Solana Foundation; RockawayX; and ARK Invest. Former Kraken Chief Legal Officer Marco Santori will serve as Solmate's CEO. Solmate expects to reach a definitive agreement with the Solana Foundation after signing a letter of intent. This agreement will lower the starting price of the additional SOL offering, enabling Solmate to significantly increase the growth rate of SOL per share in the future. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Defiance Proposes New ETFs Linked to Bitcoin and Ethereum
data.description: According to Foresight News, Defiance, an ETF issuer, has submitted an application to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to launch two new ETFs based on basis trading. One ETF will be linked to Bitcoin, with the ticker symbol NBIT, and the other to Ethereum, with the ticker symbol DETH. The Bitcoin ETF plans to invest in funds similar to BlackRock's IBIT and short Bitcoin futures on the Chicago Mercantile Exchange (CME). The expected returns will be derived from the price difference between the two markets, influenced by factors such as volatility and demand dynamics.
